pages.text: 今天天气真好！Sam 爸爸带咘咘去公园玩。公园里有滑梯、秋千，还有一个大大的沙坑。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a large friendly golden retriever dog father holding paws with a cute small white baby bunny, walking into a colorful sunny playground with slides swings and a sandbox, bright cheerful day, warm lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 沙坑旁边有一只小刺猬，正在用小铲子堆沙堡。他的沙堡好漂亮呀！小刺猬的名字叫豆豆。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a cute small hedgehog with soft brown spines building a sand castle with a tiny shovel in a playground sandbox, the sand castle is cute and colorful, warm afternoon sunlight, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 咘咘也想玩铲子。她跑过去，一把就把豆豆的铲子抢过来了！
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a cute white baby bunny grabbing a toy shovel from a startled hedgehog in a sandbox, the bunny looks determined, the hedgehog looks shocked, playground setting, dramatic moment but still cute, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 豆豆急了，伸手去抢回来。两个小朋友推来推去，沙堡倒了，铲子也掉了。豆豆哇地哭了。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny and a hedgehog pushing each other in a sandbox, a sand castle crumbling between them, a toy shovel on the ground, the hedgehog crying with tears, messy sandbox, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: Sam 爸爸走过来，蹲下来看着咘咘。"咘咘，你想玩铲子对不对？可是抢东西，豆豆会伤心的。"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a large kind golden retriever dog father crouching down to eye level with a small white bunny who looks guilty, the hedgehog crying in background in sandbox, warm fatherly moment, gentle lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: Sam 爸爸说："我们不推不抢。想要什么，用嘴巴说。来，跟爸爸一起说：'豆豆，我可以玩一下你的铲子吗？'"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a golden retriever dog father gently teaching a small white bunny, the father has one paw on the bunny's shoulder encouragingly, speech bubble showing kind words, playground sandbox setting, warm educational moment, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 咘咘小声地对豆豆说："豆豆……对不起。我可以玩一下你的铲子吗？"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny looking shy and apologetic, speaking softly to a hedgehog who has stopped crying and is listening, sandbox setting, tender reconciliation moment, soft warm lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 豆豆擦擦眼泪，点点头："好呀！我们一起玩吧！"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a cute hedgehog wiping tears and smiling, nodding happily at a white baby bunny, both starting to look friendly, sandbox with scattered sand toys, hopeful warm atmosphere, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 咘咘用铲子帮豆豆重新堆沙堡。豆豆用小手拍拍沙子。两个人一起堆，沙堡比之前更大更漂亮了！
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny and hedgehog happily building a bigger sand castle together in sandbox, the bunny using a shovel the hedgehog patting sand, the new castle is grand and beautiful, joyful cooperation, warm golden light, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: NOMI 和 NONO 也来了！NOMI 带了一个小水桶，NONO 叼来了一面小旗子插在沙堡上。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a raccoon in blue striped sweater carrying a small bucket and a small red bird carrying a tiny flag in its beak, joining a white bunny and hedgehog at a sandbox with a big sand castle, everyone happy, playground setting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: Tina 妈妈在旁边笑眯眯地看着大家。她说："你们看，用嘴巴好好说话，就能一起玩，多开心呀！"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a beautiful spotted cow mother watching four little friends playing together in sandbox with pride and joy, the white bunny hedgehog raccoon and red bird all happy, playground setting, warm maternal glow, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 回家的路上，咘咘拉着豆豆的小手——小心地拉他没有刺的手心。"豆豆，你明天还来公园吗？"豆豆开心地说："来！我们明天还一起堆沙堡！"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny carefully holding a hedgehog's tiny palm (avoiding spines), walking together on a path at golden sunset, both smiling happily, golden retriever father and spotted cow mother walking behind them, warm heartfelt ending, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536

pages.text: 💡 咘咘今天学到了：想要什么，不推不抢，用嘴巴说。"我可以玩一下吗？" 这句话好厉害，能交到新朋友哦！
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, all friends together in a group portrait - white baby bunny, hedgehog, raccoon in blue sweater, red bird, golden retriever dog father, spotted cow mother - all smiling in a beautiful sunny playground, educational warm ending scene, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition 1024x1536
